title: BFUHS Photographer Junior Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)
short_info: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) Photographer Junior Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BFUHS Photographer Junior Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation: Upper age limit relaxed up to 45 years for Punjab Govt./Boards/Corporations/Commissions/Authorities employees and all States/Central Govt. employees. Upper age limit relaxed up to 40 years for widows, divorcees and certain other categories of married women as per Punjab Govt. letter no. 1/50/83-5PP(1368)-3454 dated 23-04-1984.

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 or its equivalent qualification from a recognized Board/Institution/University. Two Years Diploma i
qualification.details: 10+2 or its equivalent qualification from a recognized Board/Institution/University. Two Years Diploma in Photography from a recognized Board/Institution. Minimum Two (2) years experience as Photographer in Govt. Institutions/Studio.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level as per 7th CPC and University Service Rules
salary_details.details: Pay Level as per 7th CPC and University Service Rules (pay scales as per Punjab Govt. Finance Dept. No. 7/42/2020-SFP1/741-746 dated 17-07-2020)

selection_process: Written Test (minimum 33% marks to qualify) Marks for Experience Inter-se Merit Document Verification Police Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BFUHS Photographer Junior Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
